extraction.one_line_summary: LAPORTE Christophe won from a late breakaway after VINGEGAARD's green jersey piloting through final roundabouts neutralized sprint trains, stealing the stage with 1km to go.
tactical_patterns: VAN AERT didn't lead out despite green jersey, VINGEGAARD piloted through final roundabouts himself to protect GC.
LAPORTE Christophe bridged solo to late breakaway after working for yellow all race, sprint teams missed the move.
WRIGHT Fred drove final kilometer for late break but lacked acceleration against LAPORTE's fresher legs at 200m.

rider_signals.LAPORTE Christophe: positive: First Tour stage win revealed untapped finishing speed despite domestique role, suggests expanded leadership potential
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: Personally piloted through 10km of roundabouts instead of relying on leadout, shows GC-protective positioning obsession
rider_signals.WRIGHT Fred: neutral: Strong late breakaway positioning but bridged riders had superior final acceleration despite his longer effort
rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: neutral: Second place shows sprint train missed critical late break but finished best of remaining bunch
rider_signals.DAINESE Alberto: positive: Third place equals best Tour result despite disrupted sprint, improving trajectory through three weeks
